examples_json: [{"en":"A wave of relief washed over me when I saw the results.","zh":"看到结果时，一股如释重负的浪潮涌来。"}]

examples_json: [{"en":"I felt like I'd been holding my breath for a year and could finally exhale.","zh":"我感觉像憋了一年的气终于能呼出来了。"}]

examples_json: [{"en":"There were nights where I genuinely thought I wasn't going to make it.","zh":"有好几个晚上我真的觉得自己完不成了。"}]

examples_json: [{"en":"I couldn't even think clearly, let alone write a coherent essay.","zh":"我连清晰思考都做不到，更别说写一篇连贯的文章了。"}]

description: 看似(简单/容易)实则不然。
examples_json: [{"en":"That's a deceptively simple question.","zh":"这个问题看似简单实则不然。"}]

scene_title: 雅思·IELTS Band 8.5 游刃有余
examples_json: [{"en":"We've been sold this very narrow definition of success.","zh":"我们被灌输了一种非常狭隘的成功定义。"}]

examples_json: [{"en":"They had the courage to prioritize what matters to them.","zh":"他们有勇气优先考虑对自己重要的事。"}]

examples_json: [{"en":"They may look less successful on paper, but they're happier.","zh":"他们在表面上可能看起来不那么成功，但他们更快乐。"}]

examples_json: [{"en":"I'm not sure we've fully processed how profound that change is.","zh":"我不确定我们完全消化了这个变化有多深刻。"}]

examples_json: [{"en":"Rates of loneliness have never been higher.","zh":"孤独感从未如此之高。"}]

scene_title: 雅思·IELTS Band 8.5 游刃有余
examples_json: [{"en":"We're scrolling through someone's curated highlight reel.","zh":"我们在刷别人精心包装的精彩片段。"}]

scene_title: 雅思·IELTS Band 8.5 游刃有余
examples_json: [{"en":"Are we using it intentionally, or letting it use us?","zh":"我们在有意识地使用它，还是让它使用我们？"}]

scene_title: 雅思·IELTS Band 8.5 游刃有余
examples_json: [{"en":"I catch myself doing the same thing — and it's humbling.","zh":"我发现自己也在做同样的事——这让人谦卑。"}]

scene_title: 雅思·IELTS Band 8.5 游刃有余
examples_json: [{"en":"Older generations have something valuable — perspective.","zh":"老一辈有宝贵的东西——视角。"}]

scene_title: 雅思·IELTS Band 8.5 游刃有余
examples_json: [{"en":"What I find impressive is their emotional intelligence.","zh":"我觉得了不起的是他们的情商。"}]

scene_title: 雅思·IELTS Band 8.5 游刃有余

scene_title: 雅思·IELTS Band 8.5 游刃有余
examples_json: [{"en":"I think we're living proof that more information doesn't make us wiser.","zh":"我觉得我们就是活生生的反例——更多信息并没有让我们更有智慧。"}]

examples_json: [{"en":"We're more susceptible to misinformation than ever.","zh":"我们比以往更容易受到错误信息的影响。"}]

scene_title: 雅思·IELTS Band 8.5 游刃有余
examples_json: [{"en":"A wise person is the one who's best at filtering out noise.","zh":"有智慧的人是擅长过滤噪音的人。"}]

scene_title: 雅思·IELTS Band 8.5 游刃有余
examples_json: [{"en":"We need to learn how to sit with uncertainty when there are no clear answers.","zh":"我们需要学会在没有明确答案时与不确定性相处。"}]

scene_title: 雅思·IELTS Band 8.5 游刃有余
examples_json: [{"en":"I think the optimal balance is competition with a foundation of cooperation.","zh":"我认为最优平衡是在合作基础上的竞争。"}]

scene_title: 雅思·IELTS Band 8.5 游刃有余
examples_json: [{"en":"The best leaders know how to bring out the best in others.","zh":"最好的领导者知道如何激发别人的潜力。"}]

scene_title: 雅思·IELTS Band 8.5 游刃有余
examples_json: [{"en":"The organizations that do this well are the ones that truly thrive.","zh":"能把这件事做好的组织才是真正繁荣的。"}]
